prestazioni: F131B 3.6L V8 (3586cc) dry-sump engine with a custom Motec M150 ECU reflash, optimizing individual cylinder fueling and ignition timing for 520hp at 8,700 RPM (stock: 400hp) while retaining the flat-plane crankshaft’s 9,000 RPM redline. Includes a secondary throttle body delete and port-matched intake plenums by Novitec Rosso for improved airflow.

Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3D-printed titanium exhaust manifold by Capristo, paired with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system with dual 100-cell catalytic converters and X-pipe crossover by Fabspeed Motorsport.

Ohlins TTX40 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), custom valving for the 360 Spider’s aluminum-intensive chassis, and spherical bearing top mounts by SuperPro. Includes a full polybush kit (front control arms, subframe, and differential mounts) by Whiteline for improved rigidity and turn-in response.
estetica: Novitec Rosso N-Largo widebody kit with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom 3-piece rear diffuser, increasing track width by 60mm for aggressive stance and improved aerodynamics. Includes custom carbon fiber side skirts with integrated LED turn signals.

Carbon fiber hardtop conversion by Zagato, featuring a removable targa panel with a lightweight aluminum frame and a rear spoiler with active Gurney flap (adjustable via a cockpit switch) for downforce tuning. Includes a custom carbon fiber engine cover with a clear polycarbonate window to showcase the F131B V8.

Brembo GT 380mm 6-piston front and 355mm 4-piston rear brake kit with two-piece floating rotors and Pagid RSL29 brake pads, paired with custom gold-anodized calipers and stainless steel braided brake lines by Goodridge. Includes a custom carbon fiber brake duct system by APR Performance for improved cooling.
